forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 12:20pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the early morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning easterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending easterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending easterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the eastern border, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border at night. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the eastern border, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border at night. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h shifting southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the evening. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek in the evening. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the evening. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
